name: Stryv Bank
description_short: Stryv Bank is a community bank offering checking accounts, mortgage services, and business lending with no monthly fees and access to MoneyPass ATM networks nationwide.
description_long: Stryv Bank is a Kansas-based community bank with nearly 50 years of banking history, though it recently rebranded from Chisholm Trail State Bank to Stryv in 2024. The name change reflects the bank's evolution toward serving business customers while maintaining its community banking roots. The bank is headquartered in Wichita, Kansas, and has been recognized as one of Wichita's Fastest Growing Businesses and Best Places to Work. The bank offers EZ Checking accounts with no monthly maintenance fees, no transaction fees, and unlimited check writing. Account opening requires only a $100 minimum deposit with no minimum balance requirement. Customers receive surcharge-free access to MoneyPass ATMs across the country. Beyond checking, Stryv provides mortgage financing for residential properties, renovations, and investment properties, as well as business lending solutions. The bank emphasizes online banking tools, online bill pay, competitive rates, and flexible lending options. Stryv distinguishes itself through its focus on personalized service and local decision-making. The bank emphasizes having "real-life bankers" available to customers and touts responsive lending for business customers. Their rebranding signals a commitment to modernization while retaining the stability of five decades of banking experience. The company positions itself as enabling customers to achieve what "others call impossible" through flexible financing and professional support. As a regional community bank, Stryv's primary limitation is geographic focus—while the ATM network is national, core banking services appear concentrated in Kansas and surrounding regions. Customers seeking extensive branch networks or investment products may need to look elsewhere. The website provides limited detail on specific loan terms, APRs, or comprehensive product ranges, which is typical for community banks directing customers to contact loan officers directly.
services: EZ Checking accounts with no monthly fees
Online banking portal and account management
Competitive interest rates on deposits and loans
pros: No monthly maintenance fees on EZ Checking accounts
No transaction fees on checking accounts
Unlimited check writing with no restrictions
Only $100 minimum deposit required to open an account
Surcharge-free access to MoneyPass ATM network across the country
Flexible business lending options tailored to customer needs
Local decision-making with Kansas-based leadership and real-life bankers
Online bill pay and digital banking portal for account management
cons: Limited geographic presence—primarily serves Kansas and surrounding regions despite national ATM access
Website provides minimal specific information on loan terms, APRs, or detailed product offerings
No mention of investment products, savings accounts, CDs, or other traditional banking products
Mortgage and business loan details require contacting loan officers rather than transparent online pricing
As a smaller regional bank, may have fewer digital features compared to larger national banks or neobanks
best_for: Small business owners seeking flexible, locally-approved lending and responsive banking relationships
Kansas and regional customers prioritizing community banking with no-fee checking
Homebuyers and property investors looking for local mortgage solutions and personalized service
Professionals and individuals seeking straightforward checking accounts without maintenance or transaction fees
diagnosis: Stryv Bank is best for Kansas-area residents and small business owners who value community banking relationships, transparent no-fee checking, and flexible local lending decisions. The primary caveat is limited geographic reach and minimal online transparency regarding specific rates and terms, which require direct contact with loan officers.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community bank offering checking accounts, mortgage services, and business lending with no monthly fees and nationwide MoneyPass ATM access.
